metadata.description: Voltmancer's personal Claude Code plugins — cross-machine tools that travel with Itay across his Linux box, work Mac, and anywhere else he runs Claude Code

plugins.name: scriber
plugins.description: Live session scribe into Notion. Builds a running page under Lab → Scribe with a 'Now' block + adaptive sections (Timeline, Findings, Decisions, Open Questions, References) as you work. Hybrid manual/auto. Use when you want a session's work — debug, SOP, research, anything — captured as a Notion page you can resume after distractions or promote into the Lab Pipeline as a Draft.
